news.t: Goldman Sachs Hires New Model Portfolios Head
Tech has a chance to outperform into year-end as Covid cases rise, market analyst says
Goldman Sachs ETF chief breaks down new investment trend

holdings.infoBox: GSLC is an equity ETF with a total of 437 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.94%, Apple at 6.67%, Microsoft at 4.34%, Amazon.com at 3.45%, and Alphabet at 3.22%.

overview.description: The TR Activebeta US Large Cap Equity ETF (GSLC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of US large-cap stocks comprising 4 sub-indexes: value, momentum, quality, and low volatility. The index uses multiple factors to pick stocks, and each sub-index receives equal weight. GSLC was launched on Sep 21, 2015 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
